text: No action required.** This is the known CLI-mode false

positive — already documented in LEARNINGS.MD.

The "Connection refused 127.0.0
.1:8000" errors from builder, keeper, and planning are expected behavior when running in CLI mode (no backend
server). These agents call `notify_parent` and `add_task_trace` which make HTTP requests to the backend API.
Without a server running, those calls fail with ECONNREFUSED — but the errors are caught in try/except and don't affect

agent operation.

This pattern has been seen and confirmed multiple times. No
